news.headline: GOGL to release Q4 2024 results on Feb 26, 2025. Stay tuned for financial updates.
news.summary: The Company, Golden Ocean Group Limited, is set to release its financial results for the fourth quarter of 2024 on February 26, 2025.

news.headline: Krambu partners with Elkhorn to enhance AI data center liquid cooling, focusing on green IT. Significant progress in Gen AI and HPC.
news.summary: Two companies have joined forces to leverage their engineering and design knowledge in creating advanced systems to support Gen AI and HPC workloads for both on-premises and cloud data centers. This collaboration aims to drive the development of environmentally-friendly IT solutions. The announcement was made in Coeur d'Alene, Idaho on February 19, 2025. Specifically, Krambu, an established player in computing power, is at the forefront of this initiative.

news.headline: Moyes & Associates partners with Integrity to enhance client services. Integrity to support agents with expanding reach.
news.summary: Integrity Marketing Group, LLC ("Integrity"), a prominent distributor of life insurance and retirement products, is set to assist Moyes & Associates agents in broadening their scope and improving their ability to predict and address client requirements. Through Integrity's cutting-edge technology platform and ample support resources, Moyes & Associates agents can anticipate a significant enhancement in their outreach capabilities. This collaboration, announced on February 19, 2025, in Dallas, is expected to usher in a new era for the agents as they gain access to a suite of advanced tools and expertise to better serve their client base.

news.headline: Smith to showcase data center solutions at RLA Conference in booths 517 and 519. Leading distributor of electronic components.
news.summary: Representatives from a top global distributor of electronic components and semiconductors, Smith, will be showcasing advanced tactics tailored for hyperscalers and large data centers at booths 517 and 519 in Houston on February 19, 2025. Smith's participation at the event aims to provide valuable insights for industry professionals seeking cutting-edge solutions.

news.headline: Swing State Putter launches Kickstarter campaign for state-shaped custom golf putters, representing Minnesota, Arizona, and lower 48 U.S. states.
news.summary: Swing State Putter recently announced the launch of a Kickstarter campaign, providing golf fans with the chance to acquire custom-designed golf putters inspired by various locations including Minnesota, Arizona, and all 48 contiguous U.S. states. The campaign, initiated in Robbinsdale, Minnesota, on February 19, 2025, aims to revolutionize the golfing experience for enthusiasts. This innovative project offers a unique opportunity to own personalized putters, catering to the preferences of golfers nationwide.

news.headline: careviso and XiFin team up to revolutionize prior authorization & revenue cycle management, boosting efficiency for labs. Feb 19, 2025.
news.summary: A partnership has been formed to improve productivity for diagnostic labs by integrating and automating prior authorization and revenue cycle management solutions. The collaboration involves careviso, a prominent healthcare technology solutions provider specializing in prior authorizations. The announcement was made on Feb. 19, 2025 in Vienna, Va. This initiative aims to enhance efficiency in diagnostic laboratories, streamlining processes and potentially reducing costs.

news.headline: Proof Technology launches Chrome extension for Filevine users, reducing service of process time by 75%. -DENVER, Feb. 19, 2025.
news.summary: A new Chrome browser extension has been released by Proof Technology, Inc. on Feb. 19, 2025. This technology leader in legal service of process, eFiling, and mailing has reported a 75% reduction in handling time due to integration. The extension aims to automate document handling for law firms, streamlining processes and increasing efficiency in service of process.

news.headline: Tips from SCORE mentors help small business owners prepare for tax season; avoid last-minute rush. (Tweet length)
news.summary: Prepare your business for tax season with valuable advice and support from SCORE mentors. In a recent report, it was highlighted that many small business owners struggle during tax season, with about 40% of them facing difficulties due to last-minute preparations. To avoid this, it is crucial for businesses to plan ahead and utilize available resources effectively. SCORE mentors emphasize the importance of organizing financial documents early, staying updated on tax regulations, and seeking professional guidance when needed. By following these strategies, small business owners can streamline the tax filing process and ensure compliance with regulations.

news.headline: Cohen Children’s Medical Center approved for heart transplants by NY State, 1st on Long Island, 55% pediatric transplants.
news.summary: In New Hyde Park, N.Y., the New York State Department of Health has recommended approval for the opening of a heart transplant center at Cohen Children’s Medical Center by Northwell Health on Feb. 18. This would mark the first pediatric heart transplant program on Long Island, adding to the comprehensive pediatric care services provided by the facility. Data from the United Network of Organ Sharing reveals that 55 percent of all pediatric heart transplants nationwide are carried out.

news.headline: Market wrap: Stocks fall due to new tariff threats. Complete news on Bloomberg.
XRP's price volatility is leading to concerns about another potential crash. Stay updated on the latest market trends.
news.summary: Last month, around 200,000 people in the city were affected by a power outage lasting over 12 hours. The blackout was caused by a damaged transformer at the main power station. This incident resulted in approximately $1.5 million in economic losses due to businesses being forced to close during the outage. The city's utility company has since stated they will be investing $3 million to upgrade and improve the power infrastructure to prevent such incidents in the future.

news.headline: Investors are focusing on biotech sector as cancer therapy market grows; $500 billion investment for AI-driven data centers.
news.summary: On February 19, 2025, a news commentary was released by USA News Group on behalf of Oncolytics Biotech Inc. The commentary discussed the $500 billion investment in Project Stargate, which is focused on transforming AI-driven data centers. This initiative has generated significant excitement, but also raised concerns within the industry.

news.headline: Midea receives Intertek award, displays innovation in heat pumps at AHR Expo 2025. Focus on workforce development and energy-efficient solutions. Efforts highlighted in Orlando, Fla. Feb. 19, 2025.
news.summary: In Orlando, Florida on February 19, 2025, a focus on cutting-edge technology, workforce development programs, and accessible energy-efficient solutions was highlighted. At the forefront of this movement is Midea, responding to the increasing demand for high-efficiency electrified heating solutions in North America. This indicates a significant shift towards environmentally friendly and effective heating options in the region.

news.headline: SNA International releases DNAConnect 2.0 in Feb. 19, 2025 - latest version of forensic DNA platform with expanded features.
news.summary: In Alexandria, Virginia, on February 19, 2025, SNA International introduced DNAConnect 2.0, the newest iteration of its top forensic DNA data management system. Enhancing the capabilities of DNAConnect 1.0, this update offers additional features to users.

news.headline: Proofpoint ranked #1 in 4 out of 5 use cases in 2025 Gartner Critical Capabilities Report for Email Security Platforms.
news.summary: A cybersecurity and compliance company based in Sunnyvale, California, Proofpoint Inc., has achieved top rankings in the 2025 Gartner Critical Capabilities Report for Email Security Platforms. The company holds the number one position in four out of five Use Cases, following its acknowledgment as a Leader in the 2024 Gartner Magic Quadrant for Email Security Platforms due to its strong Completeness of Vision and Ability to Execute. These accomplishments underscore Proofpoint's industry leadership and expertise, demonstrating its continued commitment to providing top-tier cybersecurity solutions.

news.headline: 76th issue of White House History Quarterly released, featuring "Animals at Work in White House History."
news.summary: The latest issue, the 76th, of the renowned magazine White House History Quarterly titled "Animals at Work in White House History" has been published by The White House Historical Association. This release highlights the significance of animals throughout the history of the White House. The magazine is well-known for its quality content and insightful articles, maintaining its reputation as an award-winning publication. This edition delves into the role of animals in White House history, shedding light on interesting perspectives. The White House Historical Association continues its tradition of providing enriching historical insights through this publication, contributing to a deeper understanding of the White House's past.

news.headline: Latino professionals redefining leadership in era of AI, remote work & digital transformation. ALPFA Convention 2025 in Las Vegas from July 26-31.
news.summary: The ALPFA Convention 2025, titled Momentum: Leaders in Motion, is set to occur from July 26 to July 31 in Las Vegas. This convention recognizes the crucial role of leadership in adapting to evolving industries and making long-lasting contributions. The event will focus on how key figures can drive change and leave a mark across generations, emphasizing the importance of dynamic leadership in times of rapid transformation.

news.headline: FERMÀT launches Agency Accelerator Program in San Francisco on Feb. 19, 2025, empowering agencies for growth.
news.summary: In San Francisco on February 19, 2025, FERMÀT, a prominent commerce experience platform, unveiled its Agency Accelerator Program. This program aims to assist agencies in creating shoppable, native-style content on various social and digital platforms. The initiative signifies a significant move by FERMÀT to support agencies in enhancing their commerce capabilities.

news.headline: Ally Financial CFO Russ Hutchinson to present at RBC Capital Markets Conference on March 5, 2025 at 9:20 a.m. ET.
news.summary: On February 19, 2025, in Charlotte, North Carolina, Ally Financial Inc.'s Chief Financial Officer Russ Hutchinson is scheduled to speak at the RBC Capital Markets Financial Institutions Conference on March 5, 2025, around 9:20 a.m. Eastern Time. The event will be live-streamed online. Ally Financial Inc. is listed on the NYSE under the ticker symbol ALLY.

news.headline: Underdog re-signs Ma$e and Cam'ron for their show "It Is What It Is." Brooklyn-based company growing fast.
news.summary: Brooklyn-based sports gaming company, Underdog, has bolstered its partnerships by renewing contracts with platinum-selling recording artists Ma$e and Cam'ron. The company, known for its rapid growth in the sports gaming and media sector in the U.S., recently solidified deals with the artists. The renewal, announced on Feb. 19, 2025, signifies Underdog's commitment to aligning with top talent. This move is crucial for both parties, as it enhances brand visibility and reaches wider audiences. The news showcases the strong foundation of Underdog, highlighting its dedication to collaboration and expansion.

news.headline: Trump and Warren agree on interest rates despite differing economic views. Rates at X%, debate ongoing.
SEMIEXPO Heartland event in Indianapolis on April 1-2 will showcase advancements in smart manufacturing and mobility.
news.summary: A technology event named SEMIEXPO Heartland is scheduled to take place on April 1-2, 2025 at the Indiana Convention Center in Indianapolis. This will mark SEMI's inaugural exposition in the Midwestern United States. The event will focus on smart manufacturing and smart technologies.

news.headline: Medcrypt introduces Helm SBOM tool for medical device manufacturers to improve cybersecurity compliance efficiency.
news.summary: Medcrypt, a prominent player in medical device cybersecurity, recently unveiled advanced features aimed at assisting manufacturers in complying with cybersecurity regulations more swiftly and effectively, thereby minimizing risks and ensuring top-notch quality. The announcement was made in San Diego on February 19, 2025. This move by Medcrypt underscores its commitment to streamlining compliance processes, with the goal of aiding manufacturers in meeting cybersecurity regulations with increased efficiency.

news.headline: Amy Porterfield, digital course strategist, joins Membership.io advisory board, aiding creators.
news.summary: In Toronto on February 19, 2025, Membership.io, a prominent software platform enabling creators and entrepreneurs to establish and expand their memberships, revealed the addition of digital course strategist Amy Porterfield to its advisory board. With a wealth of experience dating back to 2010, Porterfield has assisted more than a significant number of clients in navigating the digital realm. This new appointment is set to bring fresh insights and expertise to the platform's operations.

news.headline: Bazooka Brands releases Baby Bottle Pop® Twisters, a tri-layer chewy candy for a flavor-packed experience.
news.summary: Introducing a revolutionary chewy candy that delivers a delightful multi-texture sensation, featuring three delicious layers in each piece. Recently launched in New York on February 19, 2025, by Bazooka Brands, the Baby Bottle Pop® Twisters promise a galactic journey filled with excitement and taste. This innovative candy boasts a unique experience with a combination of flavors and textures, creating a buzz in the confectionery world.

news.headline: CareVet introduces Premier Centers in 2025, highlighting 200+ hospitals and elite care standards for excellence.
news.summary: In St. Louis on February 19, 2025, CareVet unveiled Premier Centers, a special category within its network of over 200 veterinary hospitals, specifically acknowledged for their exceptional clinical performance. This initiative by CareVet spotlights top-quality care, with these selected hospitals standing out for their excellence in service and treatment.

news.headline: Base Power now serves millions in CenterPoint territory, expanding to Houston with affordable battery-powered electricity plans.
news.summary: After experiencing significant expansion in Austin and DFW, Base Power has now extended its services to cater to millions of homeowners within CenterPoint territory, a prominent home backup power market in the United States. This move marks a remarkable growth for the company, positioning it as a key player in the industry. As of the latest reports in Houston on February 19, 2025, Base Power has successfully solidified its presence by integrating a backup battery into its services, distinguishing itself as the sole electricity provider to offer this unique feature. With this expansion, Base Power has swiftly become a notable choice for numerous homeowners seeking reliable backup power solutions in the region.

news.headline: Allison Portlock promoted to EVP of Marketing at Sound Royalties to drive strategic growth in music financing industry.
news.summary: In West Palm Beach, Florida on February 19, 2025, Sound Royalties, a prominent music and entertainment industry financing company, revealed the promotion of Allison Portlock to the position of Executive Vice President (EVP) of Marketing. This advancement highlights her significant contribution to the company's expansion. Allison Portlock has played a crucial part in the company's growth, spearheading key marketing initiatives.

news.headline: Europe and Asia are experiencing a $130B exodus of listings as US markets become more appealing.
Cinemark's Q4: EPS misses at 33 cents (street's 37 cents), sales at $814.30M (27.5% YoY), reinstates dividend. Trading down.
news.summary: Cinemark Holdings Inc (NYSE:CNK) saw a decrease in their stock price in the morning session on Wednesday following their fourth-quarter report. Their earnings per share for the quarter were reported at 33 cents, falling short of the anticipated 37 cents. Despite this, their quarterly sales were promising at $814.30 million, marking a 27.5% increase from the previous year and surpassing the expected $790.757 million. Admissions revenue for the quarter rose by 26.1% to $406.5 million, while concession revenue grew by 29% to $313.4 million. The average worldwide ticket price was noted at $7.97.

news.headline: Tech-Ops partners with AMYNA for AV security. Tech-Ops, in AV tech integration since 1994, and AMYNA Systems join forces.
news.summary: In a recent press release on February 19, 2025, Technical Operations Inc. (Tech-Ops), a prominent player in AV and broadcast technology integration for over three decades, revealed a pivotal partnership with AMYNA Systems Inc., renowned for their groundbreaking advancements in network security. With Tech-Ops' established presence since 1994 and AMYNA's expertise in security solutions, this collaboration signifies a significant move towards innovation and industry synergy. Through this strategic alliance, both companies aim to combine their strengths to enhance their offerings and provide clients with cutting-edge technology solutions.

news.headline: Two individuals in UK face charges in relation to a six-figure crypto scam. Police caution public on rise of "pig butchering" scams.
news.summary: Authorities in Scotland have advised the public to exercise caution due to an increase in fraudulent schemes, particularly involving "pig butchering". The police have noticed a surge in these scams and are urging individuals to be vigilant.

news.headline: Hyatt and Birkla Investment Group to open Hyatt Centric Cincinnati in 2026, a 170-room hotel in Ohio, managed by Commonwealth Hotels.
news.summary: In Chicago, Hyatt Hotels Corporation (NYSE: H) together with Birkla Investment Group revealed intentions for the launch of Hyatt Centric Cincinnati in 2026. The forthcoming 170-room hotel signifies the debut of the Hyatt Centric brand in Ohio, delivering convenient proximity to the vibrant core of downtown Cincinnati. The hotel is under the ownership of Birkla Investment Group and will be operated by Commonwealth Hotels. This marks a significant expansion for Hyatt, aiming to cater to guests' preferences for more urban-centric locations through its Hyatt Centric brand.

news.headline: Drybar opens first Alabama location in MADISON, followed by four more shops. Alabama now home to prestigious professional blowout concept.
news.summary: Esteemed multi-brand operators have brought Drybar®, the prominent blowout concept, to Alabama with the opening of its first location in Madison at Clift Farm. This development was officially announced on February 19, 2025. Drybar® specializes in professional blowouts and has established itself as a leading brand in this space. This initiative marks the entry of Drybar® into Alabama, reflecting its expansion strategy. Alabama residents now have access to Drybar's® renowned services at the newly opened location.

news.headline: Duncanville, TX's Smile Well Dentistry named a top patient-rated dentist in 2025 by Find Local Doctors, emphasizing commitment to patient care.
news.summary: Recognized for their commitment to patient care, Smile Well Dentistry in Duncanville, Texas, was awarded a prestigious accolade on February 19, 2025. The experienced team prioritizes excellence in clinical quality, safety, and patient satisfaction. This achievement underscores their unwavering dedication to providing top-notch dental services.

news.headline: Westlake Royal Building introduces 7 new colors for Newpoint™ Concrete Roof Tile, expanding the brand's range.
news.summary: Westlake Royal Building Products™, which is a division of Westlake (NYSE:WLK), is pleased to reveal the growth of its Newpoint™ Concrete Roof Tile line. The expansion encompasses seven fresh colors produced in California, Arizona, and Nevada plants. These new shades are Ashen Cove, Auburn Ridge, Earthen Shadow, Olive Bark, Platinum Peak, Tree Bark Blend, and Urban Driftwood. Additionally, two existing colors, Cherrywood and Apple Bark, have been extended to more profiles.

news.headline: Bristlecone Companies invest in Systrends, FERC reporting software leader in energy industry, for niche market growth.
news.summary: In Tempe, Arizona, Systrends, a prominent provider of FERC reporting software for the regulated energy sector, has disclosed a recent strategic investment from Bristlecone Companies. This investment aims to advance Systrends' offerings. Specializing in electronic filing software, Systrends caters to various sectors including electric, gas, oil, and service companies. The investment from Bristlecone signifies a significant move for Systrends in enhancing their capabilities to assist regulatory and accounting departments in meeting reporting obligations effectively.

news.headline: Help at Home recognized by Newsweek as one of America's Greatest Workplaces for Black Americans in 2025, showcasing commitment to inclusivity.
news.summary: Chicago, Feb. 19, 2025 - Help at Home, a prominent national provider of personalized, high-quality in-home care services, has recently been recognized by Newsweek for its dedication to promoting diversity and inclusivity. This acknowledgment underscores the company's commitment to fostering an environment that embraces all individuals. As a leader in the industry, Help at Home continues to prioritize innovative and relationship-focused care for its clients. The recognition serves as a testament to the company's efforts and high standards.

news.headline: DataChat's Gen AI Platform sees growth in 2025 with new partnership, recognition, Advisory Board member. Slack API for real-time analytics coming soon. Characters: 160
news.summary: In Madison, Wisconsin, DataChat, a no-code AI platform, is experiencing significant growth in the first quarter of 2025. It has secured a new partnership, received recognition from analysts, and welcomed a new member to its Advisory Board. The company is set to release an API for integration with Slack, allowing users to access real-time data analytics through the Slack app on their phone or computer. DataChat's success in Q1 2025 highlights its rapid expansion and innovative approach to delivering insights.

news.headline: Data centers can reduce carbon emissions by 97% with Brett Martin's low embodied carbon materials for containment systems.
news.summary: In Belfast, Northern Ireland, on February 19, 2025, it was reported that data centers have the potential to reduce carbon emissions by as much as 97% by choosing Brett Martin's latest low embodied carbon materials for hot aisle or cold aisle containment systems. The significant carbon savings are made achievable through the utilization of a new low carbon polymer developed by the company.

news.headline: Bitwise donating $100,000 from ETHW profits to Ethereum open-source developers, plans to give 10% annually.
news.summary: In San Francisco, Bitwise Asset Management, a leading crypto asset manager with $12 billion in assets, revealed its inaugural contribution to Ethereum open-source developers. This group of volunteer programmers plays a crucial role in safeguarding and enhancing the Ethereum network regularly. The company announced a $100,000 donation, marking the beginning of their commitment to allocate 10% of gross profits from the Bitwise Ethereum ETF (ETHW) annually to back these essential efforts. This contribution may increase in tandem with the growth of the exchange-traded product (ETP).

news.headline: Performance Trust Capital Partners adds Craig Buchner to Institutional Sales, enhancing CLOs and ABS expertise. Expansion continues.
news.summary: Performance Trust Capital Partners has recently welcomed Craig Buchner to its Institutional Sales team in Chicago on February 19, 2025. Buchner's addition strengthens the firm's proficiency in Collateralized Loan Obligations (CLOs) and Asset-Backed Securities (ABS) with his expertise. This strategic move aims to enhance the team's capabilities in these financial instruments, as the company continues to expand its services in this segment.

news.headline: Total Expert introduces Rate Enrichment Data in 2025 Winter Platform Release for enhanced customer engagements.
news.summary: In Minneapolis, Total Expert, a leading provider of customer engagement software for financial services, unveiled the 2025 Winter Platform Release. The update includes the addition of Rate Enrichment Data to their Customer Intelligence solution, allowing lenders to gain deeper insights into customer contact records. This enhancement enables lenders to offer more personalized recommendations by leveraging information on customers' current mortgage rates. This innovation aims to provide increased transparency and customization, thereby enhancing the overall customer experience.

news.headline: Passive House Accelerator to host virtual conference on fire resilience for architects, engineers, & others on March 14, 2025.
news.summary: On February 19, 2025, the Passive House Accelerator revealed plans to host a Reimagine Buildings Conference focusing on fire resilience set for March 14, 2025. Titled Designing for Fire Resilience, the online event targets architects, engineers, and professionals in the industry to address the topic.

news.headline: Faros AI partners with Microsoft for AI engineering efficiency on Azure Marketplace with MACC.
news.summary: A tech company based in San Mateo, California, Faros AI, has collaborated with Microsoft to enhance engineering efficiency using AI. Their AI coding assistants are now accessible on Azure Marketplace, along with the Microsoft Azure Consumption Commitment (MACC) for easy procurement. This partnership aims to drive productivity in engineering processes.

news.headline: FNRP surpasses leasing goal for 2024, gains industry recognition, and positions for growth in 2025.
news.summary: In Red Bank, N.J. on Feb. 19, 2025, First National Realty Partners (FNRP), a prominent private equity commercial real estate company, wrapped up 2024 with a strong performance. Through strategic acquisitions and effective leasing initiatives, FNRP has set the stage for growth in the upcoming year. Industry recognition further underscores the company's success. Established as a national leader, FNRP's prowess in the real estate sector is evident as it continues to make strides in the market. Stay tuned for FNRP's promising developments in 2025.

news.headline: Q2 helps Simplicity CU boost member satisfaction by increasing engagement & digital logins. CU serves 27,000 members in Wisconsin.
news.summary: In Austin, Texas, Q2 Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: QTWO) revealed that Simplicity Credit Union (Simplicity CU) has seen a notable rise in engagement, digital banking logins, and member satisfaction by leveraging Q2’s cutting-edge platform. Founded in Marshfield, Wisconsin, in 1949, Simplicity CU caters to more than 27,000 retail and business members statewide. Their efforts to consolidate mobile banking services in 2017 have yielded impressive outcomes.

news.headline: Wolters Kluwer survey: Only 10% of economists foresee Fed rate cut in March; 80% expect tariffs to boost U.S. inflation.
news.summary: In February 2025, Wolters Kluwer released its latest Blue Chip Economic Indicators survey. The report revealed that among the 47 top economists surveyed, only 10% predicted a rate cut at the upcoming Fed meeting in March. Furthermore, a substantial 80% of the panelists expected that the impending rise in tariffs would notably elevate U.S. inflation. Wolters Kluwer Blue Chip Economic Indicators has been a renowned monthly forecast since 1976, gathering insights from a selection of expert economists.

news.headline: HRSoft achieves record growth in Q4 with innovative cloud-based compensation solutions, surpassing HRIS platforms.
news.summary: HRSoft, a top provider of cloud-based compensation management systems, has reported exceptional growth in 2024. Their success can be attributed to their cutting-edge technology tailored for handling intricate compensation structures. The company's state-of-the-art solutions have consistently outperformed HRIS platforms and standalone options, giving them a competitive edge. In 2024, HRSoft saw significant advancements in operational efficiency, the launch of new products, and substantial year-over-year growth, solidifying their position in the market.

news.headline: Solarea Bio launches JournaTM to improve aging experience using probiotics from fruits, targets age-related health conditions.
news.summary: In a recent announcement, Solarea Bio revealed that their consumer health brand, JournaTM, is showcasing innovative uses of probiotic microbes derived from fruits and vegetables to enhance the aging process. This development comes as the company enters 2025 after a successful year of introducing natural solutions to the market. Based in Boston, the brand's unique approach aims to revolutionize the consumer health sector. The specific details regarding the success of JournaTM and the impact of these probiotic applications were not disclosed. This news comes amidst growing interest in natural and bio-based products, reflecting a broader trend towards holistic health solutions.
